citations.narrative:
- Upon arriving for an unannounced inspection I was met by a man who stated that he was the ex-husband of the
licensee. This individual told me that the licensee had moved to Missouri and was no longer raising dogs. I attempted to
call the phone number on file, but the number had been disconnected. There has been no response to an email sent to
the email address on file.
Licensees must notify Animal Care and obtain a new license at least 90 days before any change in name, address, or
management of the business.
Correct from this date (6 March 2026) forward.
The licensee was not available for inspection or exit interview.
n

narrative:
2.1(b)(1) 
   
Requirements and application 
- Upon arriving for an unannounced inspection I was met by a man who stated that he was the ex-husband of the 
licensee. This individual told me that the licensee had moved to Missouri and was no longer raising dogs. I attempted to 
call the phone number on file, but the number had been disconnected. There has been no response to an email sent to 
the email address on file. 
Licensees must notify Animal Care and obtain a new license at least 90 days before any change in name, address, or 
management of the business.  
Correct from this date (6 March 2026) forward. 
 
The licensee was not available for inspection or exit interview. 
 
 n
